title: Use logging instead of print()
guideline: Application code must not call print(); use the module-level logger instead.

rule.message: print() is forbidden; use logger.info/debug instead

good_example:
import logging

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

def greet(name):
    logger.info("hello %s", name)

title: Function names are snake_case
guideline: All function and method names use snake_case (dunder names allowed).

title: No mutable default arguments
guideline: Never use list/dict literals as default parameter values; default to None and initialize inside the function.

rule.message: mutable default argument; use None and initialize inside the body

title: Functions carry docstrings
guideline: Every function definition starts with a docstring describing behavior.
bad_example:
def add(a, b):
    return a + b

title: FastAPI route handler shape
guideline: Route handlers are async, typed, and return response models directly.
